summary: Completed frontend testing for password visibility toggles and admin support ticket features. All new features are working correctly.
passed_tests: Login page password visibility toggle - Eye icon successfully shows/hides password
Signup page password visibility toggle - Both password and confirm password fields have independent working toggles
Admin login flow - Successfully logs in and redirects to admin dashboard
Support tickets page loads correctly with ticket list (11 tickets visible)
Delete ticket button appears in ticket details with correct data-testid
Delete confirmation modal appears with proper warning message and ticket subject
Cancel button in delete modal works correctly (closes modal)
Confirm delete button successfully deletes ticket (ticket count reduced from 11 to 10)
Status action buttons present: Mark In Progress, Mark Resolved, Close Ticket
All buttons have correct data-testids for automated testing
